Helium (HNT) Is Officially Migrating to Solana (SOL) Blockchain After Community Vote
articles.description: The decentralized wireless network Helium (HNT) is officially migrating to the Solana (SOL) blockchain after a community vote upheld the decision. The Helium Foundation announced on Thursday that its community approved the move by a majority 81.41% vote on Helium Improvement Proposal (HIP) 70.
